name: script-writer-root
description: Script Writer — 웹 배포용 루트 (Netlify/Vercel) (핵심 에디터만)

scripts.build: cd script-writer-web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.netlify-drop:
npm run build && node -e "console.log('
  배포할 폴더: script-writer-web/dist
  이 폴더를 https://app.netlify.com/drop 에 드래그하세요.
')"
